response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music was present, as indicated by the reference JSON. However, transcription matched the spoken English and Japanese dialogue perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: The JSON was primarily used to confirm details about the scenes and characters, while all speech was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings have been strictly synchronized with the speakers' voices, dividing rapid-fire conversational turns into logical blocks to maximize readability.

subtitles.original: Singing in the concert was beautiful, wasn't it?
subtitles.english: Singing in the concert was beautiful, wasn't it?

subtitles.original: Yeah! It was! It was really beautiful!
subtitles.english: Yeah! It was! It was really beautiful!

subtitles.original: Hey, Okayu's English challenge!
subtitles.english: Hey, Okayu's English challenge!

subtitles.original: Cyan symbolize sincerity and self-acceptance.
subtitles.english: Cyan symbolizes sincerity and self-acceptance.

subtitles.original: And you don't have to try to be strong or try to be perfect.
subtitles.english: And you don't have to try to be strong or try to be perfect.

subtitles.original: That's right!
subtitles.english: That's right!

subtitles.original: Just accept yourself as you are, and go with the flow, and you'll be fine.
subtitles.english: Just accept yourself as you are, and go with the flow, and you'll be fine.

subtitles.original: Oh! Can I be strong?
subtitles.english: Oh! Can I be strong?

subtitles.original: Strong cat? I wanna be a strong big cat!
subtitles.english: Strong cat? I wanna be a strong big cat!

subtitles.original: Big cat! Yay!
subtitles.english: Big cat! Yay!

subtitles.original: Raora strong cat! Raora strong cat!
subtitles.english: Raora strong cat! Raora strong cat!

subtitles.original: Thank you, senpais, for your nice words! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, senpais, for your nice words! Thank you!

subtitles.original: Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Thank you! Thank you!

subtitles.original: 心に響きました。
subtitles.english: It really touched my heart.

subtitles.original: よかった、よかった。
subtitles.english: I'm glad, I'm glad.

subtitles.original: And here! From here, I've got some exciting news for you guys!
subtitles.english: And here! From here, I've got some exciting news for you guys!

subtitles.original: It's about the Raora Panthera Birthday Celebration 2026!
subtitles.english: It's about the Raora Panthera Birthday Celebration 2026!

subtitles.original: So, please senpais, help me out, okay?
subtitles.english: So, please senpais, help me out, okay?

subtitles.original: Okay! Okay!
subtitles.english: Okay! Okay!

subtitles.original: グッズ紹介、お手伝いします! 任せてー!
subtitles.english: We'll help you introduce the merchandise! Leave it to us!

subtitles.original: Okay! So, Raora Panthera 誕生日記念 2026...
subtitles.english: Okay! So, Raora Panthera Birthday Celebration 2026...

subtitles.original: グッズの、ご予約受付...
subtitles.english: pre-orders for the merchandise...

subtitles.original: ...スタート! Let's go! So, take a look here!
subtitles.english: ...have started! Let's go! So, take a look here!

subtitles.original: こちらどうぞ。おおー!
subtitles.english: Here you go. Oh!

subtitles.original: So good! Look at this illustration! Do you like it?
subtitles.english: So good! Look at this illustration! Do you like it?

subtitles.original: おお、すごい可愛い! めっちゃ可愛いよ!
subtitles.english: Oh, it's so cute! So cute!

subtitles.original: The illustration was drawn by Komiya-sensei! Thank you so much for making this beautiful art! I'm so happy!
subtitles.english: The illustration was drawn by Komiya-sensei! Thank you so much for making this beautiful art! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 胡宮先生に描いてもらったみたいです! ライブのラオーラをテーマに描いてもらったみたいですね。
subtitles.english: It seems it was drawn by Komiya-sensei! It looks like it was drawn with the theme of Raora's live concert.

subtitles.original: Okay! So, let's take a closer look at the details! First up, this one!
subtitles.english: Okay! So, let's take a closer look at the details! First up, this one!

subtitles.original: Long sleeve t-shirt!
subtitles.english: Long sleeve t-shirt!

subtitles.original: おお、ロンTシャツ! ロンTシャツ!
subtitles.english: Oh, a long-sleeve T-shirt! Long-sleeve T-shirt!

subtitles.original: It features a motif logo on the back, and there is also design on the sleeve. So it's really, really cool for everyday life! So, please check it out!
subtitles.english: It features a motif logo on the back, and there is also a design on the sleeve. So it's really, really cool for everyday life! So, please check it out!

subtitles.original: 可愛い! 後ろにロゴとかも付いててね、いっぱいデザインが凝ってて可愛いですね。
subtitles.english: Cute! With the logo on the back and a very elaborate design, it's really cute.

subtitles.original: And next, we have... Ta-da!
subtitles.english: And next, we have... Ta-da!

subtitles.original: Body bag! ボディバッグ!
subtitles.english: Crossbody bag! Crossbody bag!

subtitles.original: And it's a perfect design for everyday use, that lets you show off your love for...
subtitles.english: And it's a perfect design for everyday use, that lets you show off your love for...

subtitles.original: ...me, cat! Big cat! Big cat! Big cat!
subtitles.english: ...me, the cat! Big cat! Big cat! Big cat!

subtitles.original: Thank you! Next up is... Ta-da!
subtitles.english: Thank you! Next up is... Ta-da!

subtitles.english: Crying Chattini plushie!

subtitles.original: Crying Chattini, that's what you deserve! That's what you get!
subtitles.english: Crying Chattini, that's what you deserve! That's what you get!

subtitles.original: まあまあまあ...
subtitles.english: There, there, there...

subtitles.english: The crying Chattini comes with an amazing pouch!

subtitles.original: Next, please! Next, please!
subtitles.english: Next, please! Next, please!

subtitles.original: Ta-da! おおー!
subtitles.english: Ta-da! Oh!

subtitles.original: Perfect! You can combine them together!
subtitles.english: Perfect! You can combine them together!

subtitles.english: It looks like Chattini got locked inside the washing machine! Wash wash!
